evidence_excerpt: Details of Call for Proposals Name of the Programme Empowering Indigenous Technologies for Sustainable Semiconductor Supply Chain Launch Date: 23rd July 2025 Last Date: 30th September 2025 Extended Date: 30th October 2025 About Technology Development Board (TDB) TDB provides financial assistance to Indian industrial concerns and other agencies, attempting development and commercial application of indigenous technology, or adapting imported technology to wider domestic applications. TDB’s goal is to make the weak zone of technology development and commercialization strong in selected sector by supporting technology development in the industry with short-, medium- and long-term risk horizon. call_title: Call for Proposals on "Building U.S.-India Partnerships to Drive Innovation in Critical Minerals and Quantum Technology | Department Of Science & Technology
evidence_excerpt: As you are aware, the Indo-U.S. Science and Technology Forum (IUSSTF) was established under an agreement between the Governments of India and the United States in March 2000. IUSSTF is an autonomous bilateral organization jointly funded by both governments to promote science, technology, engineering, and innovation through substantive interaction among government, academia, and industry. The Department of Science & Technology, Government of India, and the U.S. Department of State are the respective nodal departments.
